merge.diff:
diff --git a/src/jinja2/ext.py b/src/jinja2/ext.py
index d21b83aa..3b033952 100644
--- a/src/jinja2/ext.py
+++ b/src/jinja2/ext.py
@@ -1,4 +1,5 @@
 """Extension API for adding custom tags and behavior."""
+import hashlib
 import pprint
 import re
 import typing as t
@@ -257,6 +258,7 @@ class InternationalizationExtension(Extension):
     def __init__(self, environment: Environment) -> None:
         super().__init__(environment)
         environment.globals["_"] = _gettext_alias
+        self._translation_versions: t.Dict[str, str] = {}
         environment.extend(
             install_gettext_translations=self._install,
             install_null_translations=self._install_null,
@@ -264,8 +266,40 @@ class InternationalizationExtension(Extension):
             uninstall_gettext_translations=self._uninstall,
             extract_translations=self._extract,
             newstyle_gettext=False,
+            set_translation_version=self.set_translation_version,
+            get_translation_version=self.get_translation_version,
+            compare_translation_versions=self.compare_translation_versions,
+            translation_version_control=True,
         )
 
+    def _translation_version_key(self, message: str) -> str:
+        return hashlib.md5(message.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()
+
+    def set_translation_version(self, message: str, version: str) -> None:
+        """Associate a version identifier with a translation string so
+        that later changes to the string can be tracked.
+        """
+        self._translation_versions[self._translation_version_key(message)] = version
+
+    def get_translation_version(self, message: str) -> t.Optional[str]:
+        """Return the version identifier previously stored for ``message``,
+        or ``None`` if no version has been set.
+        """
+        return self._translation_versions.get(self._translation_version_key(message))
+
+    def compare_translation_versions(self, message1: str, message2: str) -> bool:
+        """Return ``True`` if ``message1`` and ``message2`` have the same
+        stored version. Returns ``False`` if the versions differ or if
+        either message has no version set.
+        """
+        version1 = self.get_translation_version(message1)
+        version2 = self.get_translation_version(message2)
+
+        if version1 is None or version2 is None:
+            return False
+
+        return version1 == version2
+
     def _install(
         self, translations: "_SupportedTranslations", newstyle: t.Optional[bool] = None
     ) -> None:
@@ -363,8 +397,9 @@ class InternationalizationExtension(Extension):
         plural_expr_assignment: t.Optional[nodes.Assign] = None
         variables: t.Dict[str, nodes.Expr] = {}
         trimmed = None
+        metadata: t.Dict[str, str] = {}
         while parser.stream.current.type != "block_end":
-            if variables:
+            if variables or metadata:
                 parser.stream.expect("comma")
 
             # skip colon for python compatibility
@@ -379,6 +414,28 @@ class InternationalizationExtension(Extension):
                     exc=TemplateAssertionError,
                 )
 
+            # metadata parameters carry translation workflow information
+            # and are stored separately instead of as template variables
+            if token.value in ("note", "created", "modified"):
+                if parser.stream.current.type != "assign":
+                    parser.fail(
+                        f"metadata parameter {token.value!r} requires a value"
+                        " assignment.",
+                        token.lineno,
+                        exc=TemplateAssertionError,
+                    )
+                next(parser.stream)
+                value = parser.parse_expression()
+                if not (isinstance(value, nodes.Const) and isinstance(value.value, str)):
+                    parser.fail(
+                        f"metadata parameter {token.value!r} must be a string"
+                        " literal.",
+                        token.lineno,
+                        exc=TemplateAssertionError,
+                    )
+                metadata[token.value] = value.value
+                continue
+
             # expressions
             if parser.stream.current.type == "assign":
                 next(parser.stream)
@@ -459,6 +516,7 @@ class InternationalizationExtension(Extension):
             plural_expr,
             bool(referenced),
             num_called_num and have_plural,
+            metadata,
         )
         node.set_lineno(lineno)
         if plural_expr_assignment is not None:
@@ -514,6 +572,7 @@ class InternationalizationExtension(Extension):
         plural_expr: t.Optional[nodes.Expr],
         vars_referenced: bool,
         num_called_num: bool,
+        metadata: t.Dict[str, str],
     ) -> nodes.Output:
         """Generates a useful node from the data provided."""
         newstyle = self.environment.newstyle_gettext
